collectiondata.overview:
Best India to France Tour Package – Explore the City of Lights and Beyond

Beneath skies brushed with Provence lavender and Parisian dawn light, France unfolds as a mosaic of art, gastronomy, and timeless elegance. With Travelxploria as your Best Travel Agency, distinguished Best Tour Operator, and renowned Best International Tour Operator—each chapter of your journey is tailored for wonder. Choose our Best Package of France, delight in shared discoveries with the Best family tour packages, or entrust every romantic flourish to our Best honeymoon packages.

Why Choose a France Tour Package from India?

Convenient Flights and Schengen Visa Assistance
Travelxploria offers seamless flight bookings from major Indian cities including Delhi, Kolkata, Mumbai, and Chennai. Our expert team provides comprehensive Schengen visa assistance, including document review and interview preparation, to help smooth your travel plans. [For the latest visa requirements, please refer to the official French embassy website.]

Rich History, Art, and Culinary Delights
From the Louvre’s masterpieces to the vineyards of Bordeaux, France’s cultural heritage and culinary excellence invite immersive exploration. Our packages include curated experiences such as private wine tastings and regional cooking workshops to enrich your trip. If you are also interested in Asian destinations, consider our India to japan Tour package or the scenic nepal tour package for your next adventure.

Ideal for Honeymooners, Families, and Culture Lovers
Whether planning a romantic getaway or a family vacation, our itineraries cater to all. Travelxploria’s seasoned guides ensure culturally respectful and enriching experiences suited to all ages.

Top India to France Tour Packages

7 to 10 Days France Tour Package from India – Paris, Versailles & French Riviera
Explore iconic landmarks with insider access, balanced with leisure time. Weather and local event calendars are considered for optimal visit timing.

France Honeymoon Packages for Indian Couples
Romantic options include private Seine river cruises and candlelit dinners beneath the Eiffel Tower’s sparkling lights—ensuring unforgettable memories. For other romantic journeys, check our extensive honeymoon packages.

Budget-Friendly France Tour Packages from India
We offer affordable India to France tour package options starting from INR [insert indicative price], designed to balance experience with cost-effectiveness. Customization is available based on preferences.

Customizable France Itineraries for Families and Groups
From kid-friendly attractions to group excursions, our packages provide flexibility and expert guidance tailored to your group’s interests. Browse our popular family tour packages to explore more.

Must-Visit Destinations in France Covered in Tour Packages

Paris – Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum & Seine River Cruise
Experience skip-the-line entry and private tours. Our India to France tour package with Seine river cruise includes exclusive twilight sailing, accompanied by expert guides sharing rich historical context.

Versailles – Royal Palace and Gardens
Enjoy after-hours access when available, enabling serene exploration of the opulent palace and manicured gardens.

French Riviera – Nice, Cannes & Monaco
Discover sun-soaked beaches and glamorous towns, with curated activities reflecting local culture and leisure.

Loire Valley – Castles and Vineyards
Explore fairy-tale châteaux and enjoy wine tastings at family-run estates, with personalized tours highlighting regional heritage.

Mont Saint-Michel – Historic Island Abbey
Visit this UNESCO World Heritage Site with expert commentary on its medieval significance and unique tidal environment.

What’s Included in the Best India to France Tour Packages?

Round-Trip Flights from Major Indian Cities
Packages include flights from Kolkata, Delhi, Mumbai, and Chennai with airport transfers ensuring hassle-free travel. Consider also flights connecting to Europe with our comprehensive India to Europe Tour package for multi-country travel.

Comfortable Hotel Accommodation with Breakfast
Stay in 3- to 5-star hotels selected for comfort and location, with daily breakfast included.

Guided Sightseeing Tours and Local Transfers
Expert guides and private transfers make your sightseeing convenient and informative.

Schengen Visa Processing and Travel Insurance
We assist with visa paperwork and provide travel insurance options for peace of mind. Please note visa processing times can vary; early application is recommended.

Best Time to Visit France from India

April to June – Spring Blooms and Mild Weather
Ideal for visiting gardens and enjoying outdoor festivals. Weather can be variable; packing layered clothing is advisable.

September to October – Autumn Colors and Festivals
Experience vibrant fall foliage and harvest celebrations. Consider local event dates when booking.

December to February – Winter Charm and Holiday Markets
Enjoy Christmas markets and winter festivals. The best India to France winter tour package includes festive activities and cozy experiences.

Frequently Asked Questions About India to France Tour Packages

How long should an ideal France trip be from India?
We recommend 7 to 10 days to explore key destinations comfortably while immersing in culture and leisure.

Is a Schengen visa mandatory for Indian travelers to France?
Yes, a Schengen visa is required. Travelxploria provides comprehensive assistance through the application process.

What is the approximate cost of a France tour package from India?
Prices range based on itinerary length and inclusions. A typical package starts from INR [insert range], with customizable options for all budgets.

Do you offer India to France tour package with Eiffel Tower visit?
Yes, this includes priority access and expert-guided tours, creating memorable experiences beneath this iconic landmark.

Can I book an India to France tour package with Seine river cruise?
Absolutely. Our packages feature private Seine river cruises at sunset, complemented by cultural commentary and optional dining experiences.

What are the details of an affordable India to France tour package?
Affordable options include well-curated itineraries focusing on key highlights with comfortable accommodations and essential inclusions, balancing value and experience.

How to Book the Best India to France Tour Package

Reputed Indian Travel Agencies Offering France Tours
Travelxploria is a trusted provider with customized service across major Indian cities including Kolkata, Delhi, Mumbai, and Bangalore. We hold certifications from [insert relevant bodies].

Tips for Online Booking and Exclusive Discounts
Book early to avail early-bird discounts and seasonal offers. Check refund policies and package details carefully.

Important Travel Documents and Packing Essentials
Ensure your passport has at least six months validity. Carry visa approval, travel insurance documents, and pack layers including comfortable walking shoes, an adapter, and weather-appropriate clothing.
For more travel inspirations, explore the serene beauty of India to bhutan tour, the Nordic charm with our norway tour package from india, or the icy wonders in the finland tour package from india.
With Travelxploria’s best India to France tour package, experience la belle vie—whether on a romantic escape, family vacation, or cultural discovery. From France tour packages from Mumbai and Delhi to customizable itineraries, your French adventure starts here.

packages.overview:
• Begin your journey in Hungary’s vibrant capital.

  • Explore the iconic sights and rich history of Budapest.

  • Relax in one of Europe’s largest thermal baths.

  • Travel to Austria’s elegant and cultural capital.

  • Discover Vienna’s grand architecture and royal heritage.

  • Enjoy Vienna at your own pace.

  • Journey to the fairytale city of Prague.

  • Visit the historic Prague Castle complex.

  • Explore the UNESCO-listed medieval town.

  • Bid farewell with memories of Central Europe’s finest gems.

Arrive in Budapest, Hungary’s enchanting capital straddling the Danube River, where history and modern charm blend seamlessly. Upon arrival at the airport or station, you’ll be greeted and transferred to your hotel for check-in. Take some time to relax or begin exploring the nearby surroundings. Whether it's strolling along the scenic banks of the Danube or discovering the grandeur of historic landmarks like the Parliament Building or Chain Bridge, Budapest welcomes you with its rich culture and warm hospitality. Your Central European journey begins in this captivating city known for its thermal baths, vibrant streets, and architectural wonders.

Embark on a fascinating journey through the city guided by an expert Travelxploria representative who brings history to life. Buda Castle, Fisherman's Bastion, Matthias Church, and St. Stephen’s Basilica. A tour through the heart of Budapest lets you discover both the Buda and Pest sides of the city. The guide will walk you through key historical landmarks, such as the majestic Buda Castle, the stunning Fisherman's Bastion, and the iconic Matthias Church. You’ll also visit the beautiful St. Stephen’s Basilica in Pest, which is home to Hungary’s most revered relic.

Experience pure relaxation with a visit to the renowned Széchenyi Thermal Bath, one of Europe’s largest and most iconic spa complexes. With your entrance ticket, step into a world of rejuvenation as you explore the beautifully designed neo-baroque architecture and soak in the mineral-rich thermal waters sourced from natural hot springs. Choose from a variety of indoor and outdoor pools, saunas, and steam rooms, perfect for unwinding after a day of sightseeing. Whether you're easing travel fatigue or simply indulging in wellness, the Széchenyi Spa offers a quintessential Budapest experience, blending history, health, and luxury in a truly unique setting.

Travel from Budapest to Vienna by train and enjoy a smooth and scenic ride through the heart of Central Europe. The journey takes approximately 2.5 to 3 hours, offering comfortable seating and picturesque views of the countryside along the way. Departing from Budapest’s Keleti Railway Station, you’ll head west toward Austria’s sophisticated capital. Upon arrival at Vienna’s central station, make your way to your hotel and settle in. The rest of the day is free for you to begin exploring the elegant streets, grand palaces, and cultural richness that define Vienna, setting the tone for the next chapter of your journey.

Discover the elegance and imperial grandeur of Austria’s capital on a comprehensive Vienna city tour that includes entrance to the majestic Schönbrunn Palace. Begin by exploring Vienna’s most iconic landmarks such as the Ringstrasse, Hofburg Palace, St. Stephen’s Cathedral, and the Vienna State Opera, while learning about the city’s rich Habsburg history and cultural legacy. The highlight of the tour is a guided visit to Schönbrunn Palace, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, where you’ll walk through opulent state rooms and beautifully maintained gardens. This immersive experience offers a perfect blend of history, architecture, and royal charm, showcasing Vienna’s timeless allure.

Enjoy a full day at leisure in Vienna, a city that effortlessly blends imperial grandeur with vibrant modern culture. Take this opportunity to explore at your own pace—perhaps stroll through the charming streets of the Old Town, relax at a traditional Viennese café with a slice of Sachertorte, or visit one of the city’s many renowned museums or galleries. For nature lovers, the beautifully manicured gardens of Schönbrunn Palace or the Prater Park offer a peaceful escape. Whether indulging in local cuisine, shopping for souvenirs, or simply soaking in the city’s timeless charm, Vienna promises a relaxing and enriching experience.

Walk through the historic Castle District, where an expert guide will share fascinating stories about its royal past and architectural marvels. Visit the awe-inspiring St. Vitus Cathedral, a masterpiece of Gothic design, and wander along the charming Golden Lane, lined with colorful historic houses. This immersive tour provides a deeper understanding of Prague’s rich heritage, blending royalty, legend, and breathtaking scenery. With Travelxploria’s seamless service, this unforgettable journey offers the best way to experience Prague Castle’s splendor.

Just a short drive from Prague, embark on a magical day trip to Cesky Krumlov, a UNESCO World Heritage site, with the best on-ground support from Travelxploria. This fairy-tale town boasts a well-preserved medieval center, charming cobblestone streets, and a breathtaking castle overlooking the Vltava River. Stroll through its winding alleys, admire the picturesque architecture, and soak in the scenic river views. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance, you’ll uncover the town’s rich history and enchanting beauty. This tour promises an unforgettable experience, making Cesky Krumlov a must-visit destination for history lovers and travelers seeking timeless charm.

packages.overview:
• Begin your Swiss adventure in the scenic city of Zurich.

  • Explore Lucerne and enjoy stunning alpine views from Mount Titlis.

  • Journey to the “Top of Europe” for breathtaking snowy vistas.

  • Relax or explore Zurich at your own pace.

  • Travel to the romantic city of Paris on a comfortable train.

  • Discover Parisian landmarks and visit the iconic Eiffel Tower.

  • Enjoy a magical day at Disneyland Paris with thrilling rides and entertainment.

  • Shop, dine, or explore more of Paris at your own pace.

  • Bid farewell to Europe with unforgettable memories.

Embark on a breathtaking journey to Mount Titlis and the charming city of Lucerne, guided by our expert Travelxploria representative and the best on-ground support staff. Begin by exploring Lucerne's historic Old Town, Chapel Bridge, and the Lion Monument, immersing yourself in the city's rich history. Then, ascend into the heart of the Swiss Alps, where you'll ride the Rotair revolving cable car to 3,020 meters (9,908 feet). Once at the top, experience the Glacier Cave, Ice Flyer Chairlift, and Europe's highest suspension bridge, the Cliff Walk. Revel in snow-capped peaks, thrilling activities, and stunning alpine views on this unforgettable Swiss adventure, brought to you by Travelxploria, the best travel agency.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

  • Discover Amsterdam’s charm from its streets and waterways.

  • Visit fairy-tale villages and traditional windmills.

  • Conclude your journey with unforgettable European memories.

​Begin your exciting day in London with a City Tour provided by Travelxploria right after breakfast at your hotel. Explore the city's most iconic landmarks aboard an open-top double-decker bus, passing by famous sights like Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and the Tower of London. Marvel at breathtaking views from the London Eye, the world’s tallest observation wheel, and experience the city from a new angle with a scenic River Thames cruise. With multiple stops along the route, you can step off to discover hidden gems, charming cafés, and historic streets at your own pace. As the day winds down, witness the city's magic come alive with a Panoramic Night Tour. Let Travelxploria make your London adventure unforgettable — because your dream destination is just a ride away!​

Begin your day by visiting one of London’s most iconic landmarks—Tower Bridge. Walk along its glass-floored high-level walkways and marvel at the panoramic views of the River Thames and surrounding cityscape. Learn about the bridge’s fascinating history through interactive exhibits in the Tower Bridge Exhibition. Afterward, head to The Shard, Western Europe’s tallest building, and take a high-speed elevator to the viewing platform. From the top, enjoy breathtaking 360-degree views of London’s skyline, including sights like St. Paul’s Cathedral, the London Eye, and the Tower of London. This experience offers a perfect blend of history, architecture, and stunning cityscapes.

Experience the glamour and excitement of Madame Tussauds London with your pre-booked entrance ticket, granting you seamless access to one of the world’s most iconic wax museums. Get up close with incredibly lifelike figures of global celebrities, world leaders, sports legends, and historical icons. Walk the red carpet alongside Hollywood stars, meet the British Royal Family, and strike a pose with your favorite pop stars. Don’t miss the immersive experiences like the Marvel Super Heroes 4D cinema and the Spirit of London ride. It’s a fun, interactive attraction that promises unforgettable moments and fantastic photo opportunities for all ages.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

packages.package_name: European Grand Tour: From Historic Streets to Modern Sights
packages.overview:
• Arrive in the dynamic British capital and settle into your hotel.

  • Explore iconic landmarks and enjoy panoramic views from the London Eye.

  • Visit two of London’s historic and architectural treasures.

  • Travel to the romantic city of Paris via Eurostar.

  • Discover Parisian highlights with a river cruise and Eiffel Tower visit.

  • Admire masterpieces at the world-renowned Louvre Museum.

  • Travel to the sunny French Riviera and check in to your Nice hotel.

  • Enjoy a scenic tour of glamorous coastal towns like Cannes and Monaco.

  • Cross into Italy with a beautiful train journey to Milan.

  • Explore the fashion capital’s historic and cultural landmarks.

  • Say goodbye to Europe with lasting memories of your incredible journey.

If time permits, step out for a leisurely stroll to get your first glimpse of this iconic city—perhaps catch a view of Big Ben or enjoy a cozy café nearby. Your unforgettable European adventure begins in one of the world’s most iconic capitals.

​Begin your exciting day in London with a City Tour provided by Travelxploria right after breakfast at your hotel. Explore the city's most iconic landmarks aboard an open-top double-decker bus, passing by famous sights like Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and the Tower of London. Marvel at breathtaking views from the London Eye, the world’s tallest observation wheel, and experience the city from a new angle with a scenic River Thames cruise. With multiple stops along the route, you can step off to discover hidden gems, charming cafés, and historic streets at your own pace. As the day winds down, witness the city's magic come alive with a Panoramic Night Tour. Let Travelxploria make your London adventure unforgettable — because your dream destination is just a ride away!​

Embark on an enriching London city tour featuring entrance to two of its most iconic landmarks—Westminster Abbey and Tower Bridge. Discover the rich history of Westminster Abbey, the coronation site of British monarchs, and admire its stunning Gothic architecture. Continue to Tower Bridge, where panoramic views and the glass walkway await. Along the way, enjoy sights of Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and more, offering a perfect blend of culture, heritage, and city charm.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

Sail into the romantic heart of Paris with Travelxploria on a luxurious Seine River Dinner Cruise! Glide past the city's most iconic landmarks, from the glittering Eiffel Tower to the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and the timeless Louvre Museum, all beautifully illuminated against the night sky. Indulge in a gourmet multi-course meal, expertly crafted with the finest French flavors, paired with exquisite wine. As soft melodies fill the air, soak in the enchanting Parisian ambiance, making this experience perfect for romance, celebrations, or simply a night of elegance. With Travelxploria’s impeccable service, let us turn your evening into a truly unforgettable journey on the Seine.

After breakfast, check out from your Paris hotel and head to the station to board a high-speed TGV train to Nice, the jewel of the French Riviera. Enjoy a scenic journey through the picturesque countryside of southern France, with views of rolling hills, vineyards, and coastal landscapes. The comfortable ride takes approximately six hours, offering a relaxing transition from the bustling capital to the laid-back charm of the Riviera. Upon arrival in Nice, you’ll be transferred to your hotel. Take the rest of the day to unwind or explore the vibrant Promenade des Anglais and soak in the Mediterranean ambiance.

After breakfast, check out from your hotel in Nice and head to the train station for a scenic journey to Milan, Italy’s fashion and cultural capital. The train ride offers stunning views of the Mediterranean coastline, charming villages, and dramatic alpine landscapes as you cross from France into Italy. The journey takes around five hours and provides a comfortable and picturesque travel experience. Upon arrival at Milan Centrale Station, you will be transferred to your hotel. Spend the rest of the day at leisure, taking in the elegant atmosphere, designer boutiques, and historic charm that make Milan truly unique.

Discover the elegance and history of Milan with Travelxploria’s expert guide, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Start at the breathtaking Duomo di Milano, a Gothic masterpiece, before strolling through the glamorous Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, Italy’s oldest shopping gallery. Visit the world-famous La Scala Opera House, and explore the impressive Sforza Castle, a symbol of Milan’s Renaissance glory. Walk through the stylish streets of the Brera district, soaking in its artistic charm. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support, enjoy a perfectly curated experience that blends history, fashion, and modern elegance. Let us make your Milan adventure truly unforgettable!

packages.package_name: London Paris Fusion History Meets Romance
packages.overview:
• Land in the romantic capital of France and settle into your hotel.

  • Explore Parisian landmarks with an Eiffel Tower visit and a scenic Seine River cruise.

  • Spend a magical day at Disneyland Paris.

  • Travel to London and enjoy your first taste of British charm.

  • Discover London’s highlights and ride the iconic London Eye.

  • Enjoy the scenic beauty and academic prestige on a full-day guided tour.

  • Explore royal history, ancient wonders, and Roman heritage.

  • Experience lifelike celebrity encounters at the famous wax museum.

  • Say goodbye to London and depart with wonderful memories.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Sail into the romantic heart of Paris with Travelxploria on a luxurious Seine River Dinner Cruise! Glide past the city's most iconic landmarks, from the glittering Eiffel Tower to the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and the timeless Louvre Museum, all beautifully illuminated against the night sky. Indulge in a gourmet multi-course meal, expertly crafted with the finest French flavors, paired with exquisite wine. As soft melodies fill the air, soak in the enchanting Parisian ambiance, making this experience perfect for romance, celebrations, or simply a night of elegance. With Travelxploria’s impeccable service, let us turn your evening into a truly unforgettable journey on the Seine.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

packages.package_name: London Paris Highlights From Big Ben to Eiffel Tower
packages.overview:
• Touch down in London and settle into the lively British capital.

  • Discover London’s landmarks with a city tour, cruise, and panoramic London Eye ride.

  • Dive into the magical world at Warner Bros. Harry Potter Studios.

  • Enjoy London at your own pace with optional activities or shopping.

  • Travel to Paris by train and visit the iconic Eiffel Tower.

  • Explore Parisian landmarks and enjoy a scenic cruise on the Seine.

  • Take a guided tour of the opulent Palace of Versailles.

  • Admire world-famous masterpieces at the Louvre Museum.

  • Depart from Paris with wonderful memories of your European getaway.

Spend the rest of the day at leisure, soaking in the elegance and charm of the City of Lights.

Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Sail into the romantic heart of Paris with Travelxploria on a luxurious Seine River Dinner Cruise! Glide past the city's most iconic landmarks, from the glittering Eiffel Tower to the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and the timeless Louvre Museum, all beautifully illuminated against the night sky. Indulge in a gourmet multi-course meal, expertly crafted with the finest French flavors, paired with exquisite wine. As soft melodies fill the air, soak in the enchanting Parisian ambiance, making this experience perfect for romance, celebrations, or simply a night of elegance. With Travelxploria’s impeccable service, let us turn your evening into a truly unforgettable journey on the Seine.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Paris and begin your European adventure.

  • Discover Parisian landmarks and enjoy Eiffel Tower access.

  • Spend a magical day at Disneyland Paris.

  • Travel to Brussels and relax in the Belgian capital.

  • Explore Brussels' iconic sights and local culture.

  • Head to Amsterdam and settle into the vibrant city.

  • Experience Amsterdam’s highlights with a city and canal cruise.

  • Enjoy the Heineken Experience and explore Van Gogh’s masterpieces.

  • Travel to Cologne and enjoy a scenic Rhine River cruise.

  • Continue to Frankfurt and explore at your leisure.

  • Journey to Munich, the Bavarian cultural hub.

  • Discover Munich’s history, architecture, and vibrant streets.

  • Bid farewell to Germany and fly home with lasting memories.

city tour with Eiffel Tower Ticket","day_summary":"

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

Visit the striking Atomium, an architectural wonder offering panoramic city views, and admire the regal Royal Palace of Brussels. Stroll through the European Quarter, where modern institutions shape the continent’s future, and take in the grandeur of Mont des Arts, a cultural hotspot with breathtaking cityscapes. With the Best on-ground Support Staff ensuring a seamless experience, let Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency, guide you through the charm, history, and elegance of Brussels.

After breakfast, check out from your hotel in Amsterdam and board a comfortable high-speed train to Cologne. Enjoy the picturesque views of the Dutch and German countryside during your journey. Upon arrival in Cologne, transfer to your hotel and check in. Later, explore the city's captivating blend of modern energy and historic charm, including the iconic Cologne Cathedral and scenic Rhine River promenade, setting the tone for your stay in Germany.

Experience Cologne from a unique and scenic perspective with a relaxing Rhine River cruise, expertly organized by Travelxploria and supported by the best on-ground staff. Glide along the majestic river, taking in breathtaking views of Cologne’s skyline, the iconic Cologne Cathedral, Hohenzollern Bridge, and picturesque riverside parks. This leisurely boat ride offers a blend of history, architecture, and romance, perfect for all travelers. For a truly unforgettable experience, opt for an evening cruise with a delicious dinner and drinks, making it an ideal choice for couples seeking a magical and intimate setting while admiring Cologne’s illuminated landmarks.

This comprehensive tour offers a fascinating insight into Munich’s rich history, stunning architecture, and vibrant culture.

packages.overview:
• Land in Paris and settle into the romantic atmosphere of the city.

  • Explore iconic Paris landmarks and enjoy a scenic Seine River cruise.

  • Visit the Louvre Museum and ascend the Eiffel Tower for panoramic views.

  • Travel to Brussels and explore the city’s historic charm.

  • Discover the medieval beauty of Bruges and Ghent on a full-day tour.

  • Journey to Amsterdam and enjoy the lively Dutch capital.

  • Marvel at the stunning floral displays of Keukenhof Gardens.

  • Experience traditional Dutch villages and countryside life.

  • Bid farewell to Amsterdam and fly back with unforgettable memories.

Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Sail into the romantic heart of Paris with Travelxploria on a luxurious Seine River Dinner Cruise! Glide past the city's most iconic landmarks, from the glittering Eiffel Tower to the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and the timeless Louvre Museum, all beautifully illuminated against the night sky. Indulge in a gourmet multi-course meal, expertly crafted with the finest French flavors, paired with exquisite wine. As soft melodies fill the air, soak in the enchanting Parisian ambiance, making this experience perfect for romance, celebrations, or simply a night of elegance. With Travelxploria’s impeccable service, let us turn your evening into a truly unforgettable journey on the Seine.

Step into a world of art and history with Travelxploria on an unforgettable Louvre Museum tour! Enjoy priority access, skipping the long queues to immerse yourself in centuries of artistic brilliance. Stand before the enigmatic Mona Lisa, admire the elegance of the Venus de Milo, and be captivated by the Winged Victory of Samothrace. Wander through grand galleries filled with treasures from ancient civilizations to the Renaissance. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, experience the magic of the world’s most famous museum like never before.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

With our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide of Travelxploria, wander through Bruges’ cobbled streets, past the serene Lake of Love, the towering Belfry, and the bustling Markt Square, soaking in its fairytale-like ambiance. Walk through the imposing Gravensteen Castle, feeling the echoes of history within its medieval walls. With the Best on-ground Support Staff ensuring a seamless journey, trust Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency, to curate an unforgettable experience in Belgium’s most breathtaking cities.

packages.overview:
• France – Stroll along the Champs-Élysées in Paris, admire the Eiffel Tower, visit the Louvre Museum, and enjoy the romance of the Seine River. Explore the scenic French Riviera with its glamorous beaches and historic towns like Nice and Monaco.
  • Switzerland – Experience the breathtaking landscapes of the Swiss Alps, visit the stunning cities of Zurich, Lucerne, and Interlaken, and take a scenic ride on the Glacier Express. Don’t miss the Jungfraujoch, the Matterhorn, and Lake Geneva for a picture-perfect Swiss adventure.
  • Italy – Discover the Eternal City of Rome, home to the Colosseum, Vatican City, and the Trevi Fountain. Explore the artistic wonders of Florence, the romance of Venice, and the stunning coastal beauty of Amalfi and Cinque Terre. Indulge in authentic Italian cuisine and world-class wines.
  • Austria – Immerse yourself in the imperial grandeur of Vienna, with visits to Schönbrunn Palace and St. Stephen’s Cathedral. Experience the musical charm of Salzburg, the birthplace of Mozart, and explore the breathtaking landscapes of Hallstatt and Innsbruck in the Austrian Alps.

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

We’ll start our day in central Paris, beginning with a visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower. You´ll have the chance to go up to the second floor of this famous iron landmark (tickets included). Afterwards, we’ll enjoy a relaxing boat cruise along the Seine, which will last approximately one hour and fifteen minutes. You’ll have a free afternoon to explore the city at your own pace.

Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

Today, we’ll travel to Switzerland. Upon arrival in Geneva, we’ll pass by the Palace of Nations (the European headquarters of the United Nations) and explore the pretty English Garden with its flower clock and admire the Jet d’Eau, the tallest fountain in Europe.




After lunch, we’ll continue our journey through Switzerland, traveling along the scenic routes by Lake Geneva and Lake Neuchâtel. We’ll drive along the Three Lakes region, enjoying views of magnificent vineyards set against the mountain backdrop. We’ll stop in Neuchâtel, where you can enjoy a walk by the lake, explore the historic town center, or visit the beautiful 10th-century castle. Our journey will conclude in Zurich, where we’ll arrive in the late afternoon.

With our guide, we’ll explore Zurich, the most populous city in Switzerland, and its financial and cultural heart. Known for its banks, Zurich has been twice recognized as the city with the best quality of life in the world. Afterwards, we’ll embark on a scenic cruise of nearly two hours on Lake Zurich, with brief stops to enjoy the charming villages along the route. We’ll disembark in Rapperswil, a picturesque village renowned for its medieval castle. We’ll return to Zurich by train, providing an opportunity to experience the efficiency and punctuality of the Swiss railway system.

","day_element":[{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":541,"a_name":" City Sightseeing Tour with Lake Cruise","a_type":"","a_country":"Switzerland","a_city":"Zurich","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":null,"a_details":"

Step into the heart of Zurich’s history and beauty with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel partner. Our dedicated representative and expert Travelxploria guide, backed by the best on-ground support staff, will take you on a seamless exploration of the city’s most iconic landmarks. Stroll along the prestigious Bahnhofstrasse, wander through the charming Old Town, and marvel at the Swiss National Museum and the Zurich Opera House, each brimming with culture and history. Then, transition from land to water on a scenic Lake Zurich cruise, soaking in panoramic views of the city skyline and Swiss Alps. This perfectly curated tour blends culture, history, and breathtaking scenery, ensuring unforgettable memories. With Travelxploria, every journey is crafted to be the best.

","a_weekday":"[]","a_offday":"[]","status":"A","supplier":"","relative_city":"[\"Zurich\"]","inserted_id":"[541]","edited_by_id":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","imageurl":"","images":"[{\"path\":\"/Activity/Zurich/ City Sightseeing Tour with Lake Cruise/1740742887300-lucerne-5175322_640.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Zurich/ City Sightseeing Tour with Lake Cruise/1740742887437-lake-1681485_640.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Zurich/ City Sightseeing Tour with Lake Cruise/1740742887485-istockphoto-1500592649-612x612.jpg\"}]"}}]},{"day_title":"Zurich to Lucerne & Stay at Zurich","day_summary":"

Today´s journey features stunning landscapes with tall mountains and pristine lakes. We’ll enjoy breathtaking scenery in the Interlaken region. Our first stop will be Grindelwald, where we’ll have time for a coffee before taking the cable car up the mountain. Once there, we’ll walk along a winding path leading to a suspended bridge. For those who are adventurous, crossing the bridge offers spectacular views of the surrounding glaciers. We’ll have lunch on the mountain (included) before heading back down. Our next destination is Lucerne, one of Switzerland´s most beautiful cities, where you’ll have time to explore and enjoy the charming cityscape. We’ll then return to Zurich.

","day_element":[{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":531,"a_name":" Day Trip to Grindelwald & Interlaken by Bus & Train","a_type":"","a_country":"Switzerland","a_city":"Zurich","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":null,"a_details":"

Journey to the Swiss Alps with Travelxploria for an awe-inspiring adventure unlike any other! From the moment you meet our friendly Travelxploria representative, you’ll be guided by the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria tour guide who ensures a seamless and enriching experience. Travel in comfort by luxury bus and scenic train, soaking in breathtaking mountain vistas along the way. Arrive in Grindelwald, the \"Glacier Village,\" where snow-capped peaks and charming streets create a postcard-perfect setting. Then, continue to Interlaken, a stunning town nestled between two pristine lakes, offering spectacular views and a taste of authentic Swiss hospitality. Whether you’re seeking thrilling alpine adventures or peaceful moments in nature, this tour is designed for all travelers. With Travelxploria—the best travel agency—you’re guaranteed an unforgettable journey, where every detail is perfectly crafted to give you the best Swiss Alps experience.

We’ll leave Zurich early in the morning, crossing the Alps to reach the Italian-speaking part of Switzerland. Our first stop will be Bellinzona, renowned for its three medieval castles, which are UNESCO World Heritage Sites. Perched on the hills overlooking the city, these castles highlight Bellinzona´s historical significance as a key alpine stronghold. Enjoy some free time to wander through the charming streets of the center. Next, we´ll enter Italy and stop in the charming town of Como for lunch. This town is considered the jewel of Lombardy, known for its beautiful gardens beside the lake and its spectacular cathedral. We’ll continue to Milan, where our guide will take us to the impressive Piazza del Duomo. You’ll have some time to wander around before we transfer you to the hotel.

Today, we’ll continue our journey to Pisa. We´ll ride a small tourist train to the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), where you´ll have time to admire one of the most captivating and beautiful art complexes in Italy, including the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Afterwards, we’ll head to Rome, arriving later in the day.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Milan","to":"Rome","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"3":[{"h_id":1292,"h_name":"ibis Roma Fiera","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Rome","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"3","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/ibis Roma Fiera/1744109027015-5562_ho_00_p_1024x768.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/ibis Roma Fiera/1744109027095-5562_rodbc_00_p_1024x768.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/ibis Roma Fiera/1744109027164-ibis-roma-fiera.jpg\"}]"}],"4":[{"h_id":661,"h_name":"Ergife Palace Hotel","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Rome","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856129-2024-05-31.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856238-unnamed (19).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856244-unnamed (18).jpg\"}]"}],"5":[{"h_id":1291,"h_name":"Rome Cavalieri, A Waldorf Astoria Hotel","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Rome","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"5","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Rome Cavalieri, A Waldorf Astoria Hotel/1744108899161-images (53).jpeg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Rome Cavalieri, A Waldorf Astoria Hotel/1744108899218-PetroniusSuiteBedroom.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Rome Cavalieri, A Waldorf Astoria Hotel/1744108899334-Rome_Cavalieri_A_Waldorf_Astoria_Hotel-Rome-Pool-14-32608.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Rome City Tour","day_summary":"

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.

In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

","day_element":[{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":292,"a_name":"Rome City Tour","a_type":"","a_country":"Italy","a_city":"Rome","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":null,"a_details":"

Join Travelxploria’s expert guide for an unforgettable journey through the heart of Rome, where history, art, and culture come alive. Starting from a central meeting point, our best-in-class support staff ensures a smooth experience as you explore iconic landmarks like the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Trevi Fountain. Stroll through Piazza Navona, soak in the grandeur of St. Peter’s Basilica, and uncover the city’s hidden gems. With Travelxploria’s top-notch service, skip the hassle and embrace the beauty of Rome’s timeless charm. Let us craft the perfect adventure, ensuring the best experience of your Roman holiday!

Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

Today, we’ll enjoy the stunning mountain landscapes as we cross the Apennines. Upon arriving in Venice, we’ll take a boat across the Giudecca Canal to the Island of Venice. With a local guide, we’ll visit the marvelous St. Mark’s Square. Afterwards, we’ll tour the Murano Glass Factory, where you’ll see the fascinating techniques used to create this ancient glass. You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

We will depart from Venice, traveling to Austria! Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to stroll through the historic city center and enjoy lunch in the Austrian Tyrolean capital. Afterward, we’ll journey along beautiful scenic roads through the mountains to Kitzbühel. Once there, you’ll have time to explore this picturesque village, a famous ski resort where snow can be enjoyed for most of the year. We’ll continue our journey to Salzburg, arriving by the end of the day.

to Vienna","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll get to know Austria better. During the morning, we´ll explore Salzburg, Mozart’s city. Its Renaissance and Baroque center is filled with beauty, all in the shadow of the grand castle. Next, we’ll travel through lakes and mountains to reach St. Wolfgang, a renowned pilgrimage site in Austria. We’ll then head to Traunkirchen, located beside the beautiful Traunsee Lake, where we’ll take an included cruise to see four of the lake´s castles before disembarking in Gmunden. Afterward, we’ll continue to Vienna, arriving in the evening.

Today, we’ll embark on a panoramic tour of this impressive city with a local guide. We’ll explore its majestic avenues, beautiful palaces, large parks and vibrant city center. In the afternoon, you’ll have free time to explore on your own. In the evening, we’ll include a transfer to the Grinzing district, an old wine-growing village now part of the city, known for its traditional taverns. You’ll have free time to dine in the area.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

As you enjoy your final breakfast of this unforgettable journey, take a moment to cherish the incredible memories you’ve made along the way. From breathtaking landscapes to rich cultural experiences, every moment has been a treasure. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with any final arrangements, ensuring a smooth and comfortable departure. Though our adventure together comes to an end, the experiences, friendships, and stories will stay with you forever.

packages.overview:
• France – Wander through the romantic streets of Paris, marvel at the Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, and Notre-Dame, and visit the historic charm of Rouen.
  • United Kingdom – Experience the royal grandeur of London, explore the medieval beauty of Durham, admire Edinburgh’s castles, and soak in the vibrant culture of Glasgow, Liverpool, and Dublin.
  • Netherlands – Discover the picturesque canals and rich artistic heritage of Amsterdam, home to Van Gogh Museum and Anne Frank House.
  • Belgium – Stroll through the medieval squares of Brussels and Bruges, and indulge in world-famous Belgian chocolates and waffles.
  • Germany – Explore the historic sites of Berlin, the fairytale castles of Bavaria, and the cultural vibrance of Frankfurt and Cologne.
  • Switzerland – Witness the Swiss Alps’ breathtaking beauty, visit Zurich, Lucerne, and Interlaken, and enjoy a scenic ride on the Glacier Express.
  • Italy – Step back in time with the Colosseum in Rome, explore the romantic canals of Venice, admire Florence’s Renaissance art, and relax on the stunning coastline of Amalfi.
  • Spain – Immerse in the artistic and architectural wonders of Barcelona and Madrid, experience the passion of flamenco in Seville, and soak up the sun in Costa del Sol.
  • Austria – Enjoy the imperial beauty of Vienna, the musical heritage of Salzburg, and the stunning landscapes of Innsbruck.

In the evening, we’ll take you to Via Cavour, a perfect introduction to Rome’s vibrant atmosphere. Stroll through its lively streets and explore a variety of restaurants, setting the stage for an unforgettable adventure.

Today´s journey features stunning landscapes with tall mountains and pristine lakes. We’ll enjoy breathtaking scenery in the Interlaken region. Our next destination is Lucerne, one of Switzerland´s most beautiful cities, where you’ll have time to explore and enjoy the charming cityscape. We’ll then return to Zurich.

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

Afterwards, we’ll enjoy a relaxing boat cruise along the Seine, which will last approximately one hour and fifteen minutes. You’ll have a free afternoon to explore the city at your own pace.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

Our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with any last-minute needs, ensuring a smooth departure. As you reflect on the unforgettable experiences, from historic landmarks to breathtaking landscapes, we hope you take home not just souvenirs, but cherished memories that will last a lifetime. Though this adventure comes to an end, the stories and moments shared will stay with you forever.

packages.package_name: European Capitals & Cultural Marvels: From Spain to England
packages.overview:
• Spain – A Tapestry of Culture & Heritage
  • Madrid – Explore the Royal Palace, Prado Museum, and Plaza Mayor, experiencing Spain's capital at its finest.
  • Barcelona – Admire Gaudí’s masterpieces like Sagrada Familia and Park Güell, and stroll along La Rambla.
  • Seville – Visit the Alcázar Palace, Seville Cathedral, and experience authentic Flamenco.
  • Valencia – Discover the City of Arts and Sciences and relax on stunning Mediterranean beaches.
  • France – A Stop in Timeless Beauty
  • Paris – Wander through the Champs-Élysées, Eiffel Tower, and Louvre Museum, soaking in French romance.
  • Normandy & Rouen – Walk through history at Mont Saint-Michel, the D-Day beaches, and Rouen Cathedral.
  • England – A Blend of Royalty & Tradition
  • London – Visit the Tower of London, Buckingham Palace, Big Ben, and the British Museum.
    🇬🇧 Durham & Edinburgh – Experience the medieval charm of Durham Cathedral and Scotland’s capital, with its Edinburgh Castle and Royal Mile.
  • Liverpool & Manchester – Discover the home of The Beatles and explore England’s rich industrial heritage.

packages.package_name: Grand European Odyssey: Castles, Coasts & Culture
packages.overview:
Spain: The Land of Passion & Heritage

1. Madrid – The Spanish Capital of Art & Culture

  • Explore the world-famous Prado Museum, home to masterpieces by Goya and Velázquez.

  • Visit the majestic Royal Palace of Madrid, the largest royal palace in Europe.

  • Stroll through Plaza Mayor and enjoy traditional Spanish tapas.

  • Admire the lively atmosphere at Puerta del Sol, Madrid’s bustling square.

2. Barcelona – Gaudí’s Masterpiece

  • Marvel at the Sagrada Familia, Antoni Gaudí’s architectural wonder.

  • Wander through Park Güell, a colorful, surreal park full of artistic mosaics.

  • Walk along the famous La Rambla, lined with street performers and markets.

  • Visit the Gothic Quarter, filled with medieval history and charming cafes.

3. Seville – The Heart of Andalusia

  • Watch an authentic Flamenco performance in the historic Triana district.

  • Visit the stunning Alcázar of Seville, a blend of Moorish and Spanish architecture.

  • Walk through Plaza de España, an iconic landmark with stunning bridges and canals.

  • Explore the Seville Cathedral and climb the Giralda Tower for panoramic views.

Austria: The Land of Imperial Majesty & Music

4. Vienna – The City of Music & Royalty

  • Visit the opulent Schönbrunn Palace, the summer residence of the Habsburgs.

  • Experience classical music at the Vienna State Opera.

  • Explore the Hofburg Palace, once the center of the Austrian Empire.

  • Stroll through St. Stephen’s Cathedral and the historic city center.

5. Salzburg – Mozart’s Birthplace & Alpine Beauty

  • Discover the stunning Hohensalzburg Fortress, overlooking the city.

  • Visit Mirabell Palace & Gardens, featured in The Sound of Music.

  • Explore Mozart’s Birthplace, a must-visit for music lovers.

  • Enjoy breathtaking views of the Austrian Alps.

As you arrive at the airport, our warm and welcoming Travelxploria representative will be there to greet you and assist with your smooth transfer to the hotel. Take this time to unwind, explore nearby sights, or simply relax before your adventure begins. Our representative will be available to answer any questions and ensure a seamless experience. Be sure to check the hotel reception for details about the welcome meeting with your guide and fellow travelers. In the evening, we’ll take you to Plaza Mayor and La Latina, where you can indulge in diverse culinary delights, from Indian and Chinese to Spanish and Middle Eastern cuisines.

The morning will begin with a comprehensive tour of central Madrid, featuring highlights like Paseo del Prado, Cibeles, Neptuno, Puerta de Alcalá, Plaza de Colón, and Plaza Mayor. We’ll then visit Retiro Park, a beautiful oasis in the city center, where we’ll see the lake and the Palacio de Cristal. Admission is included to the Santiago Bernabéu Stadium, the home of Real Madrid—considered by many to be the best football club in the world. Enjoy the rest of the afternoon at your leisure. In the evening, we’ll provide a return transfer to the hotel.

In the morning, we’ll leave for Aragon, travelling through the lands of Castile. Our first stop will be in Zaragoza to admire the stunning Cathedral-Basilica of Our Lady of the Pillar. We’ll then journey to the serene Poblet Abbey, one of the best-preserved medieval monasteries in the world (tickets included). Finally, we’ll head to Barcelona, where we’ll arrive in the evening.

In the morning, we´ll embark on a tour of the City of Counts. This vibrant city, nestled along the Mediterranean Sea, is famous for Gaudi’s modernist architecture, the bustling Ramblas, and its rich history, highlighted by the Universal Exposition and the Olympics hosted here. Barcelona is renowned as one of the most beautiful and fascinating European capitals. In the evening, we’ll leave Barcelona and travel north into Catalonia. Before settling into our hotel, we’ll take a walk in Girona, exploring its historic center, known for its colorful houses, the old Jewish quarter, and its impressive cathedral.

We’ll head to France, traveling through the Provence region. Our first stop will be Arles, a small UNESCO World Heritage city known for its connections to Van Gogh. Here, we can visit the Roman theater and quaint Romanesque churches. There will be time to explore and have lunch. Next, we’ll include a visit to Carrières des Lumières, an incredible underground art experience featuring a captivating display of art, images, and sound in an ancient quarry. We’ll arrive in Chambery, the charming capital of Savoy, for the evening, a medieval style city with beautiful historic center and large castle.

We’ll journey to Switzerland, arriving in Geneva. With our guide, we’ll go to Palais des Nations (headquarters of the United Nations in Europe), and we’ll see the beautiful English Garden with its flower clock, and admire the Jet d’Eau, the tallest fountain in Europe. Our next stop will be the charming, walled village of Gruyères, world-renowned for its cheese. Nearby, there are some of Switzerland´s major chocolate factories, including Nestlé. Our tour includes admission to the Maison Cailler Chocolate Factory, where you’ll enjoy a sweet tasting experience.

We’ll continue our journey along scenic roads, passing through bucolic mountain landscapes and picturesque wooden villages, until we reach Chillon Castle, built on the shores of Lake Geneva (admission included). We’ll arrive in Leysin by mid-afternoon, a charming holiday village with spectacular views of the Rhône Valley and Mont Blanc. Leysin is well-known for its winter sports resort and hiking options. Dinner will be included.

We’ll experience stunning mountain scenery today, so be sure to pack your winter clothes. We’ll ascend to Glacier 3000 by cable car ride, one of the most spectacular spots in Switzerland featuring ice and snow year-round, and where you can walk on the suspended bridge between two mountain peaks, explore the Ice Cathedral, or enjoy the Fun Park. We’ll stop in Interlaken for lunch before traveling to Lucerne, one of the most beautiful cities in Switzerland. In the evening, we’ll arrive in Zurich, with some time to explore the center before heading to the hotel.

We’ll leave Zurich early in the morning, crossing the Alps to reach the Italian-speaking part of Switzerland. Our first stop will be Bellinzona, renowned for its three medieval castles, which are UNESCO World Heritage Sites. Perched on the hills overlooking the city, these castles highlight Bellinzona´s historical significance as a key alpine stronghold. Enjoy some free time to wander through the charming streets of the center. Next, we´ll enter Italy and stop in the charming town of Como for lunch. This town is considered the jewel of Lombardy, known for its beautiful gardens beside the lake and its spectacular cathedral. We’ll continue to Milan, where our guide will take us to the impressive Piazza del Duomo. You’ll have some time to wander around before we transfer you to the hotel.

Today, we’ll continue our journey to Pisa. We´ll ride a small tourist train to the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), where you´ll have time to admire one of the most captivating and beautiful art complexes in Italy, including the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Afterwards, we’ll head to Rome, arriving later in the day.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Milan","to":"Rome","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":661,"h_name":"Ergife Palace Hotel","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Rome","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856129-2024-05-31.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856238-unnamed (19).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856244-unnamed (18).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Rome City Tour","day_summary":"

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.


In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

Join Travelxploria’s expert guide for an unforgettable journey through the heart of Rome, where history, art, and culture come alive. Starting from a central meeting point, our best-in-class support staff ensures a smooth experience as you explore iconic landmarks like the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Trevi Fountain. Stroll through Piazza Navona, soak in the grandeur of St. Peter’s Basilica, and uncover the city’s hidden gems. With Travelxploria’s top-notch service, skip the hassle and embrace the beauty of Rome’s timeless charm. Let us craft the perfect adventure, ensuring the best experience of your Roman holiday!

Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

Today, we’ll enjoy the stunning mountain landscapes as we cross the Apennines. Upon arriving in Venice, we’ll take a boat across the Giudecca Canal to the Island of Venice. With a local guide, we’ll visit the marvelous St. Mark’s Square. Afterwards, we’ll tour the Murano Glass Factory, where you’ll see the fascinating techniques used to create this ancient glass. You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

We will depart from Venice, traveling to Austria! Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to stroll through the historic city center and enjoy lunch in the Austrian Tyrolean capital. Afterward, we’ll journey along beautiful scenic roads through the mountains to Kitzbühel. Once there, you’ll have time to explore this picturesque village, a famous ski resort where snow can be enjoyed for most of the year. We’ll continue our journey to Salzburg, arriving by the end of the day.

Today, we’ll get to know Austria better. During the morning, we´ll explore Salzburg, Mozart’s city. Its Renaissance and Baroque center is filled with beauty, all in the shadow of the grand castle. Next, we’ll travel through lakes and mountains to reach St. Wolfgang, a renowned pilgrimage site in Austria. We’ll then head to Traunkirchen, located beside the beautiful Traunsee Lake, where we’ll take an included cruise to see four of the lake´s castles before disembarking in Gmunden. Afterward, we’ll continue to Vienna, arriving in the evening.

Today, we’ll embark on a panoramic tour of this impressive city with a local guide. We’ll explore its majestic avenues, beautiful palaces, large parks and vibrant city center. In the afternoon, you’ll have free time to explore on your own. In the evening, we’ll include a transfer to the Grinzing district, an old wine-growing village now part of the city, known for its traditional taverns. You’ll have free time to dine in the area.

","day_element":[{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":510,"a_name":"Vienna Old Town Tour","a_type":"","a_country":"Austria","a_city":"Vienna","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":null,"a_details":"

Step off the beaten path with Travelxploria and explore Vienna’s hidden gems on this unique tour. Discover the city’s lesser-known yet captivating spots, from quirky architectural wonders to vibrant local markets buzzing with life. Wander through charming hidden courtyards, uncovering the secrets of Vienna’s rich cultural tapestry that most visitors miss. packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable European adventure, starting in Paris, where you'll explore the Eiffel Tower, Versailles, and enjoy the city by night. Continue to Brussels, visiting Mini-Europe, then head to Amsterdam for its canals, museums, and vibrant neighborhoods. Explore Heidelberg, the Black Forest, and the Rhine Falls in Germany, followed by a journey to Jungfraujoch and Interlaken in Switzerland. Discover the Alpine charm of Innsbruck and the charming city of Ljubljana. In Italy, explore the magic of Venice, the Postojna Caves, and the wonders of Florence and Pisa, before ending your journey in Rome with visits to iconic landmarks like the Colosseum and Vatican City. Finally, fly back home, filled with memories from your European dream tour.​

packages.package_name: Fairy Tale Journey Through France, Britain & the Netherlands
packages.overview:
Travelxploria's Ultimate European Journey: Explore Iconic Landmarks Across the Continent

Embark on an unforgettable adventure with Travelxploria as we guide you through the heart of Europe’s most iconic cities, where history, culture, and breathtaking beauty await at every turn. Begin your journey in Paris, where the stunning Eiffel Tower offers panoramic views of the city, and the world-renowned Louvre Museum houses masterpieces like the Mona Lisa and Venus de Milo. As you wander the historic streets, marvel at the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and stroll along the Champs-Élysées, reaching the imposing Arc de Triomphe.

Next, discover the captivating city of London, where landmarks like Big Ben and the Houses of Parliament dominate the skyline. Explore the ancient halls of the Tower of London, and don’t miss the spectacular view from the London Eye, offering a new perspective on this vibrant city. Venture north to Edinburgh, where Edinburgh Castle sits proudly atop the city’s skyline, and hike up Arthur’s Seat for breathtaking panoramic views of Scotland’s capital.

In Glasgow, enjoy the peaceful tranquility of the Botanic Gardens and discover the fascinating exhibits at the Kelvingrove Art Gallery & Museum. Then, travel to Dublin, where you can explore the historic Trinity College and gaze upon the Book of Kells, an illuminated manuscript that has survived for centuries. While in Ireland, make sure to enjoy a pint at the Guinness Storehouse, where the legacy of Ireland’s famous beer comes to life.

As your journey continues, visit the charming Amsterdam, where a scenic Canal Cruise offers a picturesque way to view the city’s most iconic landmarks, including the Rijksmuseum and the Van Gogh Museum.

Lastly, for music lovers, head to Liverpool, where you can pay tribute to The Beatles at the Beatles Story and explore the city’s historic Royal Albert Dock. With Travelxploria, each destination is carefully curated to give you an immersive and unforgettable European experience.

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Rouen","country":"France","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Rouen","day_summary":"

We’ll start our day in central Paris, beginning with a visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower. You´ll have the chance to go up to the second floor of this famous iron landmark (tickets included). Afterwards, we’ll enjoy a relaxing boat cruise along the Seine. You’ll have a free afternoon to explore the city at your own pace.

Around 4:00 p.m., we’ll depart Paris and head to Normandy, arriving in Rouen. You´ll have free time to explore the historic center of this vibrant city, which dates back to Roman times and boasts charming medieval architecture and an impressive Gothic cathedral, offering a delightful blend of history and culture.

Today, we’ll have time to take a stroll through the center of Rouen. After this, we’ll travel to northern France. Crossing the English Channel by ferry, we’ll reach Canterbury, the religious capital of England, known for its charming historic center. Our journey will continue to London, where you’ll have some free time in the Tower Bridge area, one of the city´s most iconic symbols, before we head to the hotel.

Discover London on a panoramic tour with a local guide that showcases the city’s culture and history. You’ll see famous sites such as the Parliament, the River Thames, and Buckingham Palace, where you might witness the iconic Changing of the Guard (depending on the dates). In the evening, we’ll establish a meeting point in Piccadilly to take a stroll through Leicester Square, Chinatown, and Soho, areas renowned for their lively atmosphere, theaters, and entertainment options. You’ll have plenty of restaurants to choose from for dinner before we return to the hotel.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Durham","country":"England","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Durham Arrival","day_summary":"

We’ll start the day by leaving London and heading towards northern England. Our first stop will be Cambridge, where we’ll admire the beautiful colleges. After lunch, we’ll continue to York, where the stunning cathedral, Roman walls, and lively shopping streets will leave a lasting impression. You’ll have some free time to explore. Afterwards, we’ll proceed north to Durham, a vibrant medieval town featuring a magnificent cathedral in front of the castle.

We’ll travel to Scotland, with a stop in Alnwick, a picturesque town known for its beautiful gardens and large medieval castle, famously featured in the Harry Potter films. We’ll then continue to Edinburgh, arriving around midday. As Scotland’s capital and one of the most vibrant cities in Northern Europe, Edinburgh’s monumental center has been declared a UNESCO World Heritage Site. The castle overlooks the city’s steep streets and parks. We’ll enjoy a panoramic tour with a local guide.
